sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94928" key="skiri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῑρίτης</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σκῖρος</etym>) <sense id="n94928.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">worker in stucco</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σκιρρ-</etym>).</sense> </entryFree>
